Business: Bharat Seats Limited manufactures and sells seating systems and interior components for the automotive and surface transport industries in India. It offers seats for four-wheeler, two-wheeler, and railways chair car; carpets; roof and windshield modeling products; and two-wheeler frame parts. The company was incorporated in 1986 and is based in Gur…

  Current: 3.63 %  (+0.00% vs prior)
  India impact: Higher Fed rate → capital flows to USD, EM selling pressure; cuts → EM relief rally

  Current: 16.59  (+0.85% vs prior)
  India impact: High VIX → risk-off, FII sell EMs including India; low VIX → risk-on, inflows

  Current: 4.47 %
  India impact: Rising US 10Y → India bonds less attractive, FII debt outflows; falling → inflows
